planContent: # 🏗️ Architecture Blueprint ## App Overview "The Tactile Studio" is a visual-first digital gallery application for managing, viewing, and organizing artistic sketches. It provides a clean, high-fidelity interface for artists to browse their creative collection and trigger the creation of new works, leveraging a responsive Bento grid layout. ## Core Features - **Gallery Dashboard**: Grid-based display of all saved sketches with titles and metadata. - **Responsive Bento Grid**: Dynamic scaling (1-3 columns) based on viewport width. - **Sketch Interaction**: Hover-to-zoom effect on images; persistent shadow styling. - **Navigation Hub**: Bottom persistent nav bar for switching between Canvas, Gallery, and Settings. - **Action Interface**: Floating Action Button (FAB) for quick-triggering a new sketch creation workflow. - **Offline Persistence**: Auto-save architecture using internal indexedDB interface. ## UI & Layout Strategy - **Layout type**: Single-page application with fixed headers and footers. - **Header**: Top app bar containing the "Tactile Studio" title and a "Save" action button. - **Main content area**: Centered max-width container with a `grid` layout for gallery cards. - **Controls**: Persistent FAB (bottom-right) for adding new items; bottom navigation bar (fixed). - **Footer**: Branding integrated within the bottom navigation layout. - **Design System**: Exact Tailwind classes provided in the reference (primary: #0058bc, background: #f7f5ff). - **Color scheme**: Custom palette defined in `tailwind.config` (Surface: #f7f5ff, Primary: #0058bc, On-Surface: #242c51). - **Responsive strategy**: Mobile (1 col) to Tablet (2 col) to Desktop (3 col). FAB visibility is persistent across all breakpoints. - **Animations & UX**: Tailwind transitions on hover (scale-105 for images, scale-110 for FAB). `backdrop-blur-xl` for header. - **Touch Targets**: Min 44px height for all interactive elements (buttons, nav tabs). - **Accessibility**: ARIA labels for buttons; focus rings (standardized `focus:ring-2` for keyboard accessibility). ## Data Model & State | Variable | Type | Default | Description | |----------|------|---------|-------------| | sketches | Array<{id, title, date, src}> | [] | Core gallery dataset | | activeTab | String | 'gallery' | Tracks current nav position | | isLoading | Boolean | true | Controls loading state of images | - **Persistence Strategy**: Use `window.forge.db.set('sketches', 'list', data)` on every update. `window.forge.db.get` invoked on initialization to hydrate `sketches` array. ## Technical Stack & Libraries - **Required CDNs**: Tailwind CSS (with plugins), Material Symbols Outlined, Google Fonts (Plus Jakarta Sans, Be Vietnam Pro, Manrope). - **Allowed**: Tailwind CSS, Lucide Icons (as fallback or supplement), Material Symbols. - **APIs**: None (100% offline-first). ## Implementation Steps 1. Step 1: Initialize HTML5 boilerplate with strict `` in head. 2. Step 2: Implement the `tailwind.config` exactly as provided in the source code. 3. Step 3: Set up global styles (min-height, fonts, base colors). 4. Step 4: Construct the fixed header component with backdrop-blur. 5. Step 5: Build the bottom navigation bar and link click-handlers to state switching. 6. Step 6: Implement the `sketches` state management logic and `forge.db` integration. 7. Step 7: Create the dynamic Bento grid component that maps over the `sketches` array. 8. Step 8: Build the card component with `referrerpolicy="no-referrer"` for all `` tags. 9. Step 9: Add the FAB component with hover-to-show text logic. 10. Step 10: Finalize event listeners for "Save" button and state synchronization. ## Edge Cases & Error Handling - **Empty state**: Display a "No sketches found" message with an illustration if `sketches` is empty. - **Image failure**: Add a `onerror` fallback image or skeleton state to prevent layout collapse. - **Data corruption**: Implement a `try-catch` wrapper around `forge.db` operations; fallback to empty array on read failure. - **Mobile scaling**: Ensure FAB does not overlap with bottom navigation on small screens by adding `pb-32` padding to `body`.
